series_desc: A monthly gathering for the Black diaspora in Barcelona — building community and momentum ahead of Juneteenth Barcelona 2026 on June 20.
next_event_where: Volta Bar · Hotel Borneta · Passeig de Picasso 26–30, El Born
next_event_desc: Join us for the monthly BJuneteenth community meet-up, a gathering bringing together members of the Black diaspora as we begin preparing for Juneteenth Barcelona 2026. This meetup is about connection, collaboration, and building momentum together. The evening starts as a relaxed networking space where people can meet, exchange ideas, and learn more about the vision for Juneteenth Barcelona. Entry is free — drinks and food are available to purchase from Volta Restaurant & Bar.
venue_desc: A cozy and intimate space lit by a skylight. Pull up a chair and relax with new friends over a glass of wine, or sit at the bar and watch the mixologists craft signature cocktails. Drinks and cuisine draw from the myriad flavors found on the Mediterranean coast.
venue_address: Passeig de Picasso, 26–30, Ciutat Vella, 08003 Barcelona
venue_finding: Enter via Hotel Borneta and head to the Volta bar — we'll be there.
series_band_sub: BJuneteenth Monthly takes place on the 19th of each month, building up to Juneteenth Barcelona 2026 — our major community cookout on June 20.
